findings.title: Global search is hidden and not focusable at mobile width
findings.evidence: P3-T11 focus_smoke.global_search has visible=false, focused=false, popover_count=0, and focus failure global_search_hidden_or_not_focusable.

findings.title: Notification drawer does not keep focus within drawer during Tab smoke
findings.evidence: P3-T11 notification drawer opens and Escape closes it, but active_after_two_tabs is outside drawer on the dashboard button.

positive_observations.evidence: People directory search is visible and focused at mobile width in P3-T11.
Notification drawer trigger is visible, drawer opens, no horizontal overflow is detected, and Escape closes the drawer.
